title: Luffy Lands in Wano and Meets Tama
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8 as Luffy lands in Wano, meets Tama, and immediately collides with the poverty and cruelty of Kaido’s rule.
scene: Luffy washes up in Wano, meets Tama, and discovers a country suffering under Kaido’s rule.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Baboon!!! Deal with the komainu later!! Catch that guy!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Actually... it doesn't matter any- more!!! Kill him!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Why are you chicken- ing outtitt!!!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I'm Surren- Dering!! I'm surrendering to you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I WON'T HURT YOU, YOU KNOW!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Really...? Then can you please lend me some of your time?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What!? She pulled off her cheek!!

summary: This section advances the Wano Country Arrival storyline with 29 dialogue beats. Luffy’s first steps in Wano establish Tama’s kindness, the country’s hunger, and the brutality of Kaido’s forces.
